parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Shalin at ' + $json.businessName + ' <shalin@' + ($json.siteUrl || '').replace(/^https?:\/\//, '').replace(/\/.*$/, '') + '>', to: [$json.email], reply_to: 'shalin@' + ($json.siteUrl || '').replace(/^https?:\/\//, '').replace(/\/.*$/, ''), subject: $json.emailSubject, html: $json.emailHtml }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Shalin <noreply@forgetech.dev>', to: [$json.email], reply_to: '25shapatel@gmail.com', subject: $json.thankYouSubject, html: $json.thankYouHtml }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.businessId, content_type: 'review', platform: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.platform, title: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.name + ' - ' + $('Parse Review Data').first().json.rating + ' star review', content_text: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.reviewText, status: 'published', metadata: { customer_id: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.customerId, rating: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.rating, testimonial_requested: true }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', positive: $('Parse Review Data').first().json.isPositive, thankYouSent: true, loggedAsAsset: !$json.error }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', positive: false, noted: true }) }}
